hi, that's me! 👋
Meet the baker

Just a girl who
really loves cookies.

I'm Clucille! I couldn't find the cookie I wanted anywhere — the gooey, crackly, chocolate-pulling kind — so I started baking it myself, one little batch at a time.

Friends asked for more. Then friends of friends. Now Clookies is my whole happy place: every order baked by hand, fresh, just for you.

Happiness, baked to order. 🤎
Easy peasy

How to get your fix

📱
Step One

Slide in our DMs

Order any day on Instagram. Tell us your faves — no set order day, no waiting around.

👩‍🍳
Step Two

We bake it fresh

Everything's made to order. Give us at least 3 days to bake your box to gooey perfection.

📦
Step Three

Delivered to you

Your happy box arrives in Mandaue City. Open it warm. Try to share. (We won't judge if you don't.)

Pre-orders open daily

better day?

Order your box today — baked fresh and delivered at least 3 days later, straight from our oven to your happy place.
